heading: Exemption of Railway Labor Act from subchapter
label: 182 Exemption of Railway Labor Act from subchapter
text: The provisions of this subchapter shall not be applicable with respect to any matter which is subject to the provisions of the Railway Labor Act [ et seq.], as amended from time to time.45 U.S.C. 151
notes: References in TextThe Railway Labor Act, as amended, referred to in text, is , , which is classified principally to chapter 8 (§ 151 et seq.) of Title 45, Railroads. For complete classification of this Act to the Code, see and Tables.act May 20, 1926, ch. 34744 Stat. 577section 151 of Title 45
